label: Audit of June 2026 pricelist migration (migration 0015)
verdict: PASS — migration is mathematically correct across all 210 SKUs

real_issue.problem: Astberg's June 2026 PDF has internal math error on this row. DP Basic printed as 466.10 + GST 83.90 = 550, but DP printed as 610. Either DP Basic should have been 516.95, OR DP should have been 550.
real_issue.recommended_action: Wait for next Astberg PI for this SKU; check what they actually bill. If billed at ~413.56 per unit, write a one-SKU correction migration.

expected_outliers_aeb_family.explanation: Astberg widened dealer-to-retail gap on the ABS Ball Jet Nozzle family. MRP up 20-27%, cost up ~6%. Intentional retail margin redistribution; favours us when selling at MRP.

minor_inverse_anomalies.note: MRP -₹10 / cost +₹17 — Astberg trimmed retail + raised dealer. PDF math internally consistent. Verified correct.
MRP -₹5 / cost +₹17 — same pattern. PDF math internally consistent. Verified correct.

verification_method: Three-way reconciliation: live prod DB query  ↔  JAN-2025 catalog archive  ↔  fresh independent re-parse of all 3 Astberg PDFs. Plus per-SKU formula re-derivation (ERV: cost = MRP × 0.80 / 1.18; non-ERV: cost = DP Basic × 0.80). Drift tolerance ±₹0.05.
